grill-me.purpose: Interview the user until the plan is clear.

grill-with-docs.purpose: Clarify the plan while updating project context documents.

zoom-out.purpose: Explain the broader codebase or system context.

diagnose.purpose: Debug using reproduce, minimize, hypothesize, instrument, fix, and regression-test.

office-hours.purpose: Challenge the product framing before implementation.

plan-eng-review.purpose: Review architecture, data flow, edge cases, and tests.

review.purpose: Find production-level bugs and completeness gaps.

qa.purpose: Test the app, find bugs, fix them, and reverify.

runly-think.purpose: Router for think workflow — routes to grill-me.

runly-plan.purpose: Router for plan workflow — scope-aware routing to office-hours, grill-with-docs, speckit-specify, speckit-clarify, speckit-plan.

runly-build.purpose: Router for build workflow — routes to speckit-tasks, speckit-implement, and tdd.

runly-review.purpose: Router for review workflow — routes to plan-eng-review for code.

runly-test.purpose: Router for test workflow — routes to qa.

runly-debug.purpose: Router for debug — routes to diagnose when something breaks.

runly-spec.purpose: Router for spec workflow — routes to grill-with-docs and speckit-specify.

runly-submit.purpose: Router for submit workflow — reflection and submission package.

think.goal: Clarify the project before planning or writing code.

plan.goal: Turn intent into a spec and technical plan. Route by planning scope (mvp, feature, epic, spike, refactor) — see runly-plan router.

build.goal: Build a working vertical slice from the plan.

review.goal: Review code quality, correctness, and maintainability.

spec.goal: Define tools, inputs, outputs, and auth rules before planning.

submit.goal: Write the final reflection and prepare the submission package.
